data.content: Plan attached for implementing overview tags and filters. Recommended implementation touches only overview helper/component files: add/keep pure filter helpers in src/lib/beat-state-overview-filters.ts, wire local selected tag/setlist state through src/components/use-beat-overview-filters.ts, load per-repo plan summaries in src/components/use-overview-setlist-filter-options.ts, render compact multi-select controls in src/components/beat-overview-filter-toolbar.tsx, pass filtered beats into existing overview tab/group logic in src/components/beat-state-overview.tsx, and render visible label badges in src/components/beat-overview-tile.tsx. Tests should focus on helper semantics plus tile rendering; run focused tests and then lint/typecheck/full test/build. No child knots planned.
